title: task
description: python/src/lichen/interface/kiss/bridge.py:233-254 - When receiving a raw LICHEN message and auto-acking, the bridge generates a local msg_id (via next_msg_id()) but the sender tracked a different msg_id from their APRS app. The sender's tracker won't match, so handle_ack returns False and APRSDroid users never see delivery checkmarks. Flow: Sender sends APRS message with msg_id=123, bridge strips msg_id and sends raw text. Receiver formats for local app with local msg_id=1, acks with msg_id=1. Sender receives ack for msg_id=1 but tracker has msg_id=123 - no match. Fix: Either send msg_id through LICHEN frame, or don't auto-ack raw text messages.
close_reason: Fixed: Embedded sender's msg_id in LICHEN payload (STX + msg_id + NUL + text format). Receiver now extracts and uses original msg_id for acking, so sender's tracker matches and APRSDroid checkmarks appear.
